meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: What happened in 40 days of war on Iran
items.summary: Who got hit in the war on Iran? The attacks, the damage and the people caught in between.

items.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 44 of the US-Iran conflict?
items.summary: US-Iran talks in Islamabad end without a deal, with each side blaming the other for the failure.

items.title: Neymar has to prove his fitness for Brazil’s World Cup squad: Ancelotti
items.summary: Brazil's coach says Neymar could be in contention for the squad if he attains full fitness in the next two months.

items.title: UFC 327: Ulberg wins light-heavyweight belt with knockout in front of Trump
items.summary: Carlos Ulberg takes the UFC light heavyweight title with a first-round knockout win over Jiri Prochazka in Miami.

items.title: Hungarians vote as PM Orban faces toughest election challenge in years
items.summary: The parliamentary election could end Prime Minister Viktor Orban's 16-year hold on power.

items.title: Pakistan urges US and Iran to uphold ceasefire after talks end
items.summary: Pakistani Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar has insisted the US and Iran must uphold their ceasefire agreement.

items.title: US and Iran fail to reach deal after marathon talks in Pakistan
items.summary: US VP JD Vance says Iran chose not to accept US terms, while Iran says it did not expect a deal at the first meeting.

items.title: Musician performs inside melting glacier to highlight climate crisis
items.summary: Swiss musician To Athena has performed inside a cave in a melting glacier to highlight ice loss in the Alps.

items.title: Oil tankers exit Strait of Hormuz amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire
items.summary: Three supertankers laden with oil exit waterway amid global energy crunch, shipping data shows.

items.title: Why did US-Iran talks end without an agreement in Pakistan?
items.summary: Despite high-level talks for the first time in years, the US and Iran couldn't reach agreement on terms to end the war.

items.title: Watch JD Vance’s full remarks after US-Iran talks end without deal
items.summary: US Vice President JD Vance is leaving Pakistan, saying Tehran chose not to accept their ‘final and best offer’.

items.title: US delegation leaves Pakistan without reaching Iran deal
items.summary: US Vice President JD Vance says the US delegation has failed to reach an agreement with Iran.

items.title: Iran must not charge tolls in Strait of Hormuz, UN maritime chief says
items.summary: In interview with Al Jazeera, International Maritime Organization chief says world should reject tolls in waterway.

items.title: Netanyahu next to Middle East map: ‘We strangled them and have more to do’
items.summary: Standing by a map, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu describes how six countries wanted to strangle us’.

items.title: Palestinians appalled as Israel approves settlements in occupied West Bank
items.summary: Israel has approved 34 new settlements in the occupied West Bank, Palestinians are terrified they will lose their land.

items.title: Israel reprimands Spanish diplomat over detonation of Netanyahu effigy
items.summary: Israel says it has reprimanded Spain’s top diplomat in Tel Aviv over the blowing up of an effigy of its Prime Minister.

items.title: Iran war live: Vance says no deal reached after US made ‘best, final offer’
items.summary: Iranian media say the US was looking for an excuse to leave the peace talks and that the 'ball is in America's court'.

items.title: Fury beats Makhmudov in heavyweight boxing comeback, then calls out Joshua
items.summary: Tyson Fury beats Arslanbek Makhmudov in a unanimous points decision as he makes his heavyweight comeback.

items.title: US President Trump says US ‘wins’ regardless of how Iran talks go
items.summary: US President Donald Trump says ‘we win regardless of what happens’ in Iran talks.

items.title: “Diplomacy is not an event, it’s a process, it takes time.”
items.summary: Former Pakistani diplomat says expectations from the Islamabad talks between the US and Iran should be realistic.

items.title: Pope Leo urges world leaders to reject war and negotiate peace
items.summary: Pope Leo XIV on Saturday called on world leaders to reject war as a means of settling their differences, urging peace.

items.title: Iraqi parliament elects new president
items.summary: Iraq’s parliament has elected Kurdish politician Nizar Amedi as president after months of political deadlock.

items.title: Has Israeli society become conditioned to permanent war?
items.summary: Opinion polls indicate opposition to ending war against Iran.

items.title: Israeli strikes kill at least 18 people across southern Lebanon
items.summary: Lebanon's Health Ministry says more than 2,000 people have been killed in Israeli attacks since March 2.

items.title: Families gather to mourn victims of deadly shooting in Afghanistan
items.summary: Dozens of mourners in Afghanistan gathered to pray for victims of a shooting in Herat that killed at least 11 people.
